query: Compare arbitrage net revenues (i.e excluding charging cost and other operational costs) only for a 100 MW 2-hour battery based on 2023 day-ahead market prices in ERCOT West Hub vs PJM AEP Hub. Assume roundtrip efficiency is 81%, battery degradation cost is $25/MWh and state of charge is limited to a range of 10% to 90%
final_answer:
I can run a full, reproducible comparison using actual 2023 hourly day‑ahead prices — but I need two quick clarifications before I proceed so I use the interpretation you want:

1) When you wrote “excluding charging cost and other operational costs”, do you mean:
   - A: Exclude charging energy cost (i.e., do NOT subtract the dollars paid to buy energy when charging) and exclude other operational costs — in which case we only count revenue from discharging minus degradation cost (and account for efficiency only as it reduces discharged energy availability), or
   - B: Exclude all other operational costs but INCLUDE charging energy cost (i.e., do standard arbitrage: buy low (charge) and sell high (discharge), account for round‑trip efficiency and subtract charging cost and degradation cost)?

2) Do you want results reported as:
   - annual net arbitrage revenue (USD per year) for a single battery cycling optimally using 2023 DA prices, and/or
   - USD/MW‑year, USD/MWh of capacity, and/or summary statistics (mean, stdev, number of profitable cycles)?

If you confirm (A or B) and which outputs you want, I will:
- fetch 2023 hourly day‑ahead prices for ERCOT West Hub and PJM AEP Hub,
- model the 100 MW, 2‑hour (200 MWh nameplate) battery with SOC limited 10–90% (usable = 160 MWh), 81% round‑trip efficiency, degradation $25/MWh (applied per MWh throughput),
- optimally schedule (hourly charge/discharge) to maximize daily/annual arbitrage revenue,
- report net revenues and key diagnostics (cycles/year, average spread captured, energy throughput), and
- provide the code / calculation steps so you can reproduce or adjust assumptions.

Which option for (1) should I use (A or B), and which outputs from (2)?

tool_input.query: 2023 day-ahead prices ERCOT West Hub hourly 2023 historical day-ahead prices West Hub 2023 CSV
PJM AEP Hub day-ahead hourly prices 2023 historical AEP hub day-ahead 2023 CSV
